title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Marriott India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Marriott India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marriott India! We are hiring a Hotel Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marriott India:
Marriott India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marriott India!
